humanEffortEstimate.rationale: Full P5 security review: verification of 4 PI-1 bug fixes, STRIDE analysis of 48 threat model items against Sprint 2 code (6 tRPC routers, 29 procedures, SSH service, deployment pipeline, queue handlers, infrastructure templates, provisioning scripts), OWASP Top 10 mapping, 12 findings documented with CVSS scoring, 4 bugs filed. Comprehensive line-by-line code review of all server-side files.
